channel.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

item.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Room W17 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 17, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

May 12, 20:36 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 17/06/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 17/06/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified racks listed below may experience temporary IPMI unavailability during the operation, for a period of five minutes per rack.
W17A01, W17A02, W17A03, W17B01, W17B02, W17B03, W17A04, W17A05, W17A06, W17B04, W17B05, W17B06, W17A07, W17A08, W17A09, W17B07, W17B08, W17B09, W17A10, W17A11, W17A12, W17B10, W17B11, W17B12, W17A13, W17A14, W17A15, W17B13, W17B14, W17B15, W17A16, W17A17, W17A18, W17B16, W17B17, W17B18 , W17A19, W17A20, W17A21, W17B19, W17B20 and W17B21.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack W13A12 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 8, 10:00 - 11:30 UTC

May 21, 22:25 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 08/06/2026 10:00 UTC
End time : 08/06/2026 11:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers could experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case of their servers.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [SYD2][Dedicated Servers] - Multiple racks maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 3, 21:00 UTC  -  Jun 4, 07:00 UTC

May 13, 20:06 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 03/06/2026 21:00 UTC
End time : 04/06/2026 07:00 UTC
Service impact : Public network and IPMI will be unavailable during maintenance for servers located in the specified racks:  S2-5X-02-06A, S2-5X-02-07A, S2-5X-02-07B, S2-5X-02-08A, S2-5X-02-09A, S2-5X-02-10B, S2-5X-02-11A and S2-5X-02-11B.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [WAW][Dedicated Servers] - Room WAW0106/WAW0107 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 2, 17:30 - 20:30 UTC

May 18, 15:05 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offering, affecting servers in racks listed below :
- Rack WAW0106A02C
- Rack WAW0106A05C
- Rack WAW0106B02C
- Rack WAW0107A05C

Start time : 02/06/2026 17:30 UTC
End time : 02/06/2026 20:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers who have not configured the LACP service may temporarily experience a service interruption.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our network infrastructure, we will be upgrading multiple network devices to enhance security and reliability.

Thank you for your understanding.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [WAW1][Network] - Network equipment maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 28, 12:30 - 15:30 UTC

May 13, 20:02 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our network infrastructure.

Start time : 28/05/2026 12:30 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 15:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers who have not configured the LACP service may temporarily experience a service interruption.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will have to carry out interventions on multiple network equipment.

List of concerned Racks :
- Rack WAW0118A01B
- Rack WAW0118A01C
- Rack WAW0118A04A
- Rack WAW0118B04B
- Rack WAW0118A04B
- Rack WAW0118A04C

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L121B09 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 28, 07:00 - 09:00 UTC

Apr 30, 22:20 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 28/05/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 09:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [SBG3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack S333B07 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 28, 02:00 - 03:00 UTC

May 12, 20:17 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in rack S333B07.

Start time : 28/05/2026 02:00 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 03:00 UTC
Service impact : Public and vRack networks will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance for servers in S333B07 which doesn't have LACP activated.
However, if LACP is activated, bandwidth perturbation will be observed on Public and vRack networks for servers in S333B07.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [RBX][Storage and Backups] - Backup Storage incident notification
item.description:
May 27, 19:00 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Backup Storage offering has been resolved.

Start time : 27/05/2026 06:50 UTC
End time : 27/05/2026 14:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 27, 12:01 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Backup Storage offering.
The root cause has been identified.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 27/05/2026 06:50 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : One backup storage server is temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their data.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a hardware issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [RBX8][Dedicated Servers] - Racks R808R13 / R808R14 / R808R15 Incident Notification
item.description:
May 27, 18:15 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering in racks R808R13 / R808R14 / R808R15 has been resolved.

Start time : 27/05/2026 17:02 UTC
End time : 27/05/2026 18:08 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 27, 17:09 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific racks R808R13 / R808R14 / R808R15.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 27/05/2026 17:02 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the racks R808R13 / R808R14 / R808R15 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified racks.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [BHS6][Virtual Private Servers] - Some instances incident notification
item.description:
May 27, 17:56 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Virtual Private Servers offer which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 27/05/2026 15:46 UTC
End time : 27/05/2026 17:29 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some Virtual Private Servers in the BHS6 region were unreachable.
Customers Impact : Some customers were temporarily unable to access and use their Virtual Private Servers in BHS6.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [YYZ01][Dedicated Servers] - Some Racks Incident Notification
item.description:
May 27, 15:52 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Dedicated Servers offer which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 27/05/2026 12:30 UTC
End time : 27/05/2026 15:40 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the racks YYZ0101A01A / YYZ0101A02A / YYZ0101A03A / YYZ0101A04B / YYZ0101A04C / YYZ0101B01B / YYZ0101B02A were temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers who had not configured the LACP service may have temporarily experienced a network interruption.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [RBX6][Dedicated Servers] - Rack 46G03 Incident Notification
item.description:
May 27, 12:55 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Dedicated Servers offer which has now been resolved in rack 46G03.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 27/05/2026 12:35 UTC
End time : 27/05/2026 12:38 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the specified rack were no longer able to access via the IPMI interface.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access their servers via the IPMI interface located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L121B02 incident notification
item.description:
May 27, 12:16 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 27/05/2026 09:16 UTC
End time : 27/05/2026 11:52 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 27, 09:39 UTC
Update - Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : We are currently replacing the faulty network equipment.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 27, 09:25 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering in the rack L121B02.
The root cause has been identified.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 27/05/2026 09:16 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Public network is temporarily unavailable for servers located in the rack L121B02.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access and use their servers through public network.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L107B09 maintenance notification
item.description:
May 27, 11:54 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 27, 11:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Apr 30, 22:17 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 27/05/2026 11:00 UTC
End time : 27/05/2026 13:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [RBX6][Dedicated Servers] - Rack 46A13 incident notification
item.description:
May 27, 08:28 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 27/05/2026 06:59 UTC
End time : 27/05/2026 08:25 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 27, 07:13 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering in the rack 46A13.
The root cause has been identified.

Here are some supplementary details :
Start time : 27/05/2026 06:59 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the rack 46A13 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Storage and Backups] - Backup Storage Maintenance Notification
item.description:
May 27, 04:12 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 25, 16:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 25, 10:18 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our Backup Storage offer.

Start time : 25/05/2026 16:00 UTC
End time : 27/05/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, some storage will be temporarily unavailable for approximately 20 minutes.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Backup Storage offering to implement security and performance enhancements.

Thank you for your understanding.
